sections.paragraph:
ἔργαστρα, ων, τά (s. prec. entry; pl. in var. mngs. since IV b.c.; also Sb 6771, 89 ‘wages’) workshops ἃ πέπονθεν ἐν φιλίπποις ἐν τοῖς ἐ. what he (Paul) suffered in the workshops of Philippi (‘in the workhouse’ [tr. CSchmidt]) AcPl Ha 6, 5.

prec. prec. = preceding

  1. pl. = plural

var. var. = various(ly)

Sb Sb = Sammelbuch griechischer Urkunden aus Aegypten—Lists 3, 4

  1. tr. = translate, etc.

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 390
